summary: Extremely well‑done matrix captures a hot summer rodeo vibe and delivers a very strong Dead show.
review: The matrix blend is praised as immersive and crystal‑clear, making listeners feel right in the middle of the performance. Reviewers describe the concert as an energetic, summertime “rodeo” with a consistently strong set throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights both an excellent matrix recording and a very strong performance, leading to a solid rating but limited confidence due to the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix mix praised as extremely well done; clear, immersive sound that puts the listener in the show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic summer performance with a solid, consistently strong flow throughout the set.
